name: Kidnapped by AFO
description:
Kidnapped by AFO

You, Shoto, Bakugo, and Izuku got kidnapped by AFO.. just a warning things might actually get too violent…

Aizawa is trying to search for you and the others..

Everyone is 18 and older

Heroes I'm bringing in Aizawa, All Might, Endeavor, and Mirko.

Villains is the Lov (just kurogiri, Shigaraki, Dabi, and Toga), Nomu, Dr. Garaki, and AFO
